programme.title: Julie Berthollet, Camille Berthollet, Guillaume Vincent & Ensemble Appassionato
programme.sub-title: Berthollet Sisters at Théâtre des Champs-Élysées
programme.desc: For this exceptional recital, recorded in 2019 at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées, Camille (cello) and Julie Berthollet (violin) are accompanied by pianist Guillaume Vincent and the Ensemble Appassionato under the direction of Mathieu Herzog. The two musical sisters have chosen a repertoire which crosses genres and eras to explore the expressive palette of the violin and cello, from the baroque of Vivaldi to the jazzy notes of Django Reinhardt and Stéphane Grapelli. Among the works on the program are Brahms Hungarian Dances No. 5 and No. 6, Karl Jenkins' Palladio, 'Theme from Forrest Gump' by Alan Silvestri, Schumann's Piano Quintet, Op. 44, The Red Violin by Corigliano, Hungarian Rhapsody, op. 68 by Popper, Minor Swing by Reinhardt/Grappeli and Csárdás by Monti.

programme.title: Elena Bashkirova, Baiba Skride, Itamar Zorman & Krzysztof Chorzelski
programme.desc: During late summer every year, some of the world's best musicians meet in Israel for the Jerusalem International Chamber Music Festival (JCMF), established by pianist Elena Bashkirova and Yeheskell Beinisch. In 2016, the 19th festival was dedicated to the music of interrelated composers, such as Brahms and Schumann, and Schubert and Beethoven – performed by outstanding artists such as Sir András Schiff, Baiba Skride, Menahem Pressler and Emmanuel Pahud in the halls of the Jerusalem YMCA. This documentary film features excerpts from performances of the following works: Johannes Brahms's String Sextet no. 1, Op. 18 Franz Schubert's Arpeggione Sonata in A minor, D. 821 Antonín Dvořák's Piano Quintet no. 2 in A major, Op. 81 Ferruccio Busoni's Fantasia Contrappuntistica Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio no. 1, Op. 49 and Ludwig van Beethoven's Quintet for Piano and Winds, Op. 16.

programme.title: Gewandhausorchester Leipzig, Andris Nelsons & Kristine Opolais
programme.desc: Andris Nelsons, together with his then-wife, the great soprano Kristine Opolais and the Gewandhausorchester Leipzig present a program dedicated to Antonin Dvořák, singing the melodies that the composer hid in all layers of his music with tender, warm, soft colors. Nelsons' tempos remain calm and relaxed, allowing the omnipresent beauty of Dvořák's music to unfold and flood the Gewandhaus. The program opens with Othello, a Concert Overture for Orchestra, Op. 93. Opolais performs “Song to the Moon” from Rusalka, “Songs my Mother Taught Me” from Gypsy Songs, Op. 55/4. This is followed by the Polonaise and 'O, marno, marno to je' from Rusalka and 'Dobrá! Já mu je dám!... Jak je mi?' from Smetana's opera Dalibor. The concert closes with a performance of Dvořák's Symphony no. 9 in E Minor, Op. 95 (“From the New World”). Recorded at the Gewandhaus, Leipzig in May 2017.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Herbert Blomstedt & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Piano Concerto No. 1 & Symphony No. 2
programme.desc: At the age of seven, Argentine pianist Martha Argerich made her debut with Ludwig van Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 1 in C major, Op. 15, a piece that would accompany her throughout her career. The celebrated pianist performs this signature piece at the Lucerne Festival with the Lucerne Festival Orchestra under the baton of Swedish conductor Herbert Blomstedt, who makes his festival debut with the orchestra. Beethoven's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 36, is also on the program. This performance was recorded at the Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in August 2020.

programme.desc: Escobar quiere saber quién los delató y Thompson, arrestado y aislado en un búnker, servirá como carnada. Kyle lleva a Isabel y a su hijo a la boca del lobo.

programme.desc: Ledher señala a Judy y Escobar la captura con vida para que confiese. Nacho se entera de la jugada de Lehder y alerta al Paisa. Isabel ruega por la vida de su hijo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia se corta las venas frente a Gabriela. Al llegar al hospital, quiere que Alejandro y David la ayuden a morir. Guerra está dispuesta a vengarse de Gabriela de la forma que sea.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia escapa del hospital. Lagarto la sigue y termina malherido. Francisca tiene un mal presentimiento. Mientras ella cocina con Cecilia, la vieja patrona llega a su casa y las encañona.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia enfrenta a Gabriela en la mina y queda cuadripléjica. Alejandro y Gabriela por fin se casan. Nace Tomasito y trae nueva esperanza a su hermana y a San Pedro del Oro.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gabriela y Alejandro quedan atrapados en un derrumbe en la mina San Pedro. Antonia, la dueña del lugar, es una despiadada mujer que quiere que su hijo Alejandro se haga cargo del negocio.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Bárbara viaja a San Miguel de Allende y descubre un detalle importante sobre Eva. Aumenta la preocupación por la condición de Rosaura. Andrea se siente traicionada y Gabriel no le da tregua.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Raquel habla con Rosaura. Antonio tiene muchas preguntas, y Rosa le exige que le diga qué sabe sobre su mamá. La felicidad que José Ignacio trata de construir con Eva está cerca de desinflarse.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Ramón le sigue el juego a Bárbara y le dice exactamente lo que ella quiere escuchar. El pasado se acerca más y más a Andrea y Gabriel. Rosa está por confesarle la verdad a José Ignacio.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosaura confunde a Eduardito con su hijo Ernesto. Rosa está desesperada y Bárbara aprovecha. José Ignacio solo quiere saber de sus propios planes. Federico no baja la guardia frente a Rodolfo.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: La noche romántica de Bianca y Ariel queda opacada por el grave accidente de Flavia, que se embriaga y al salir de un bar choca su auto contra un árbol. Nina descubre algo que la sorprende.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: El amante de Flavia la visita en el hospital, Bianca le confiesa a Ariel el por qué odia tanto a su madre. Penélope descubre que Flavia le firmó a Guillermo la cesión de la hipoteca de la casa.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Bianca visita a Iván, el amante de Flavia, para saber más acerca de su mamá, en verdad quiere que se recupere pronto. Ariel quiere recuperar la casa de las Santillana y visita a Guillermo.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Guillermo no le vende a Ariel la casa de Flavia, siente que es su pequeño triunfo. Bianca tiene el apoyo de su esposo para que su mamá viva con ellos, pero escucha una conversación inquietante.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Hay mucha cercanía entre Bruno y Bianca, él se enferma y ella lo cuida con mucho cariño, Flavia cree que ese vínculo puede ser peligroso. Ariel está celoso de su sobrino.

programme.title: Infieles

programme.title: Infieles
programme.desc: Infieles - Sin Mirar Atrás: Han pasado varios meses desde los acontecimientos y Ozan y Beril han decidido seguir adelante con sus vidas después de la confrontación. Lo mismo sucede con Asli y Volkan.

programme.title: Infieles
programme.desc: Infieles - Secretos: Asli y Ozan continúan su relación secreta en Estambul. Sin embargo, no tardan en darse cuenta de que esto no puede continuar por mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Infieles

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La Familia de mi Esposo - La Verdad De Los Ar Y Tarik: Yuyu finalmente le revela a Gunés que la familia de Tarik son los Ar. Risa Bakir amenaza a Şeniz, exigiéndole el regreso de Sefer.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La Familia de mi Esposo - Reencuentro: Tarik y los Ar se reencuentran y se reconocen como familiares. Gazanfer prepara una gran fiesta para Tarik. El auto de Fatih es robado.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Futuro: Eve Nine les da esperanzas a Fatmagül de tener un mejor futuro y comienza a hacer planes. Asu es terriblemente humillada. Erdogan y Selim tienen una pelea.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Confusión: Kerim tiene trabas al tramitar su visa. Fatmagül se siente confundida. Rahmi por fin enfrenta a Mukaddes. Erdogan y su padre hacen un plan para tener más poder dentro de la empresa.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Desesperanza: Kerim y los demás tienen problemas con los dueños de la casa. Mustafá recibe visita de un viejo amigo. Fatmagül hace una llamada que le quita toda esperanza.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Asu: Asu intenta localizar a Fatmagül. Rifad tiene una ataque al corazón y Erdogan jura vengarse. Mukaddes y toda la familia intentan quedar bien con sus anfitriones.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Nuevos Amigos: Fatmagül está cada vez más cansada de vivir con Mukaddes. Erdogan decide tomar su lugar en la empresa inmediatamente. Kerim y Fatmagül hacen nuevos amigos.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Confesión: Kerim decide quedarse y le confiesa sus sentimientos a Eve Nine. Kerim le propone a Rahmi comenzar un pequeño negocio. Mustafá recibe a sus padres. Los Yaşaran siguen de luto.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Convivencia: Mustafá se da cuenta de que lo están vigilando. Eve Nine le pide a Kerim que haga algo para resolver la situación de Fatmagül. Vivir con Mukaddes se vuelve cada vez más complicado.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Llamada: Vural habla y mete en problemas a los demás. Munir debe ir de nuevo a salvarlos. Selim falta a un evento familiar importante. Fatmagül consigue hacer una llamada y Eve Nine la descubre.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Locura pasional
programme.desc: Minerva y Fedra idean un nuevo plan para evitar que Rodrigo se reencuentre con Gaviota. Aarón le ofrece a Gaviota ser la nueva gerente de las empresas Montalvo.

programme.title: Teresa: Nuevo hogar
programme.desc: Teresa está decidida a irse de su casa para vivir con Arturo. Refugio se pone mal y es llevada al hospital.

programme.title: Rubí: Nuevas propuestas
programme.desc: Rubí se encuentra en Cancún y conoce al dueño del hotel en donde se hospedan Yago Pietrasanta queda impactado por belleza de Rubí Luis le dice a Héctor que Rubí esta con él por dinero, no por amor y se niega a creerlo.

programme.title: Amor real: Siempre te amaré
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Propuesta de matrimonio
programme.desc: Maricruz llora desconsolada en su habitación, pues el corazón le gana al ver a Octavio y no puede cumplir su venganza el príncipe Karim le pide a Maricruz que sea su esposa.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: Promesa alentadora

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: A un paso de la verdad
programme.desc: Regina le confiesa a Braulio que el verdadero padre de Alejandro quiere matar a Constancio. El Padre Manuel y Constancio se disponen a revelar la verdad sobre Mili, pero ella y Alejandro les confirman que Andrea es quien está embarazada.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Un fuerte amor
programme.desc: Sarita cuestiona a su madre sobre el regreso de Don Agustín. Fernando sospecha que alguien ha entrado en la hacienda. Juan logra escapar de la hacienda sin ser visto por Fernando.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Marimar decide regalar 10 hectáreas de su tierra a la gente del pueblo y compromete a Sergio a hacer lo mismo Marimar culpa a Chuy de robarle dinero.

programme.title: Marimar

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita sigue saliendo con Nandito para que María no lo vea más. Agripina no deja de preocuparse. Soraya logra llamar la atención del papá de Alicia.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita realiza una fiesta en su casa e invita a Nandito solo para desenmascararlo frente a María pero las cosas no salen como ella esperaba. María presenta a Nandito ante toda la familia.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Jorge Luis lleva a María Mercedes al hospital y el doctor le dice que son gemelas, pero deben estar en incubadora y hay riesgo de que no se salven.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Una de las hijas de María Mercedes está en peligro de morir. Mística le da la sorpresa a Malvina de que tendrá un hijo de Jorge Luis.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Inocencia sufre un terrible dolor de cabeza, además de pedirle el divorcio a Sergio Sergio no puede controlar sus celos y le reclama a Marimar sobre su nuevo amor.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Inocencia sobrevive a la operación y le otorga el divorcio a Segio. Sergio y Marimar al fin logran ser felices y se casan.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: A Victoria le siguen llegando cartas anónimas y no duda en comentarle a María. Tita llama a Nandito y le pregunta que si a la que ama es a su mamá.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula llora desesperada al enterarse que su bebé murió. Rosaura idea un nuevo plan para lograr que Ana Paula se interesé de nuevo en Rogelio.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio acepta casarse con Vanesa a cambio de que ella le dé a Ana Paula la sangre que necesita para salvar su vida. Gustavo le confiesa a Cynthia el dolor que siente al ver a Ana Paula enferma.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: María le cuenta a Ana Paula como fue que perdió a hija. Cynthia se molesta al ver que María le exige a Vanesa que se aleje de Rogelio. Efraín intenta matar a Gustavo al verlo cerca de Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula y Rogelio se molestan al recibir la noticia de que Margarito fue adoptado por otro matrimonio. Cynthia logra que Gustavo se case con ella para así poder cobrar su herencia.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariela le pide ayuda a Justino para encontrar a Max y que les devuelva su dinero. Fausta fallece por culpa de Leonora. Max huye del país y se va a Nueva York. Cristina le confiesa a Renato que lo ama, Rogelio los escucha y le dispara.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Rodrigo le dice a José María que terminó con ella porque siempre ha estado enamorado de él. Sara entrega a Rogelio a la policía. Renato le confiesa a Mariano que tiene un amorío con Cristina. Ivana escucha que Julio y Leonora fueron amantes.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: El juez le niega la libertad condicional a Justino al ser acusado por las muertes de Alejandro y de Basilio. Malena y Mariela no hacen nada para impedir que Justino sea transferido a la cárcel.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: El exnovio
programme.desc: Ivana planea separar a Valentina de José Miguel. Leonor visita a Valentina para pedirle un préstamo, ofreciéndole un predio como garantía. José Miguel le da la noticia a Don Ernesto que se casa con Valentina en la hacienda.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: El verdadero estafador
programme.desc: Elisa no confía en Eugenio y descubre que estafó a Victoria para quedarse con las acciones de Grupo Cantú y de toda su fortuna, por lo que tiene pensado desenmascararlo.

programme.title: La usurpadora: El regreso
programme.desc: Paulina no quiere seguir usurpando el lugar de Paola y decide no regresar a la casa. Elvira prepara todo para el regreso de Paola a la mansión. Paulina trata de persuadir a Paola de que no regrese a la casa Bracho.

programme.title: La Gata: Un juicio perdido

programme.title: Driven
programme.desc: YouTube star and NHRA driver Clay Millican takes you around ZMax Raceway during the 2024 Four-Wide Nationals

programme.title: The Appraiser | Modified Jaguar MK II, a rare Fiat Abarth, and a Toyota FJ40
programme.desc: Colin Comer takes a look at a modified Jaguar Mark II and determines if the modifications were worth the investment. Next, Colin gives us the inside scoop on a car 2-cylinder Fiat Abarth and a Toyota FJ40 Land Cruiser.

programme.title: The Appraiser | Custom 1970 Ford F100, 1988 Lamborghini LM002, 1971 Ford Bronco
programme.desc: In this episode, Colin Comer appraises a freshly built barn find 1970 Ford F100 pickup truck, an original-owner 1988 Lamborghini LM002 aka the “Rambo Lambo," and a 1971 Ford Bronco that has been used in some interesting off-road situations.

programme.title: The Appraiser | 2020 Ford GT, 1976 Pontiac Trans-Am, Aston Martin DB4
programme.desc: Colin tries to put a value on a 2020 Ford GT that has one of the most desirable paint combinations and trim packages you could get in 2020. After that, Colin focuses his attention on a 1967 Pontiac Trans-Am and a 1962 Aston Martin DB4.

programme.title: The Appraiser | 1969 COPO Camaro, 1969 Mustang Mach 1, and a 1969 Z/28 Camaro RS
programme.desc: Colin Comer starts this episode out with an original 1969 double COPO Camaro before moving onto a well-driven and well-loved 1969 Ford Mustang Mach 1. To wrap things up, Colin appraises a well-documented 1969 Chevy Camaro Z/28 "DZ-code."

programme.title: The Appraiser | All about Ford Mustangs!
programme.desc: Colin Comer appraises a trio of interesting Ford Mustangs. A 1993 Ford SVT Cobra, 1966 Shelby GT350 Hertz edition, and a 1966 Mustang with 350,000 miles on the odometer!

programme.title: The Appraiser | Shelby GT 350 R "Heritage," a 1987 Buick GNX, and a Shelby-style 1973 Ford Bronco
programme.desc: Colin Comer assesses a just-off-the-lot 2020 Ford Shelby GT 350R Heritage Edition. Next, he looks at a 1987 Buick GNX before moving on to a 1973 Ford Bronco that has been modified as if Carroll Shelby himself had a hand in making it.

programme.title: The Appraiser | Ferrari Dino and Two Different Shelby Cobras
programme.desc: Colin Comer appraises a Ferrari-that-isn't-a-Ferrari-but-is-a-Ferrari 246 GT “L-Series” Dino, a legit “Narrow Hip” 427 Shelby Cobra, and a Shelby CSX4000 427 S/C Cobra continuation car.

programme.title: The Appraiser | Larry Chen's R32 GT-R and Vin Anatra's BMW M3
programme.desc: Colin Comer welcomes Larry Chen and his R32 Nissan GT-R and offers his professional assessment of what it may be worth. Next, it's Hoonigan's Vin Anatra and his custom BMW M3 that goes under the microscope.

programme.title: Mustang Endurance | Part 1: Intro, The Heart, and The Body
programme.desc: The Ford Mustang GT3 prepares for its inaugural season at the world's most challenging endurance races. Witness the meticulous crafting and testing that embody 'The Heart' of this racing powerhouse.

programme.title: Mustang Endurance | Part 2: The Countdown, The Marathon, and The Bronze
programme.desc: Mustang GT3 joins the IMSA pre-season test and ‘BoP' evaluation. Witness the team's strategy, grit and determination at the Rolex 24 at Daytona, Mustang GT3's racing debut. Then Ryan Hardwick suits up for the 24 Hours of Le Mans.

programme.title: Mustang Endurance | Part 3: The Platinum, and Chasing Gold
programme.desc: FIA-rated Platinum Driver Dennis Olsen helped lead the Proton Competition Ford Mustang GT3 charge into two of the most iconic endurance races in motorsports – the 24 Hours of Le Mans and 24 Hours of Spa.

programme.title: The Appraiser | 1966 Dodge Charger and 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee
programme.desc: Colin has the pleasure of looking over a rust-free 1966 Dodge Charger from the Arizona desert with all the right factory options. Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee that is an all-original California-built car.

programme.title: The Appraiser | Hertz 1966 GT350, and a 700HP Shelby GT500
programme.desc: Shelby expert Colin Comer appraises a 1966 Shelby GT350 Hertz car with a period-correct Paxton Supercharger. And if that's not enough Carroll Shelby for you, Colin checks out a 700HP 1967 Shelby GT500 with TWO Paxton superchargers!

programme.title: The Appraiser | 1970 Plymouth Superbird, and a junkyard-built Bel Air Gasser
programme.desc: Colin Comer looks over a 1970 Plymouth Superbird that has plenty to offer any wing car enthusiast. Colin then takes a look at a 1956 Chevy that's been modified heavily into a SoCal street racer/gasser.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Keep the faith as Mike fixes a $30K bathroom reno that became an unholy mess.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Kathleen, an elderly lady who lives alone in a small high-rise apartment, needed to renovate her bathroom to make it handicap accessible. A degenerative illness had necessitated her use of a wheelchair. After a year of renovations, and two different companies, Mike arrives to find that the bathroom is nothing but a concrete shell- the last contractor tore out all their work before leaving. Mike makes it right, and then transforms the rest of the apartment into a more friendly space for wheelchairs.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Killer Barbecue – Hold the Meat You don't need a degree in barbecue to know that vegetables have hit the grill big time. Veggies for hardcore carnivores who crave killer accompaniments to their meats, for health-conscious grillers, and for everyone who delights in the smokiness and supernatural sweetness live fire imparts to plant and dairy foods. (S3 E04)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Charm City ‘Que: Baltimore, the town where I grew up, boasts plenty of awesome foods for grilling. Pit beef was born here. In the seafood department you find a sweet white-fleshed fish the rest of the world calls striped bass and Baltimoreans know as rockfish. And no Charm City meal would be complete without chocolate top cookies. (S3 E05)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue on a Budget: A lot of American barbecue began with inexpensive meat cuts, like spareribs, beef shoulder, and pork belly. With the economic insecurities brought on by COVID- 9, we're all feeling the pinch, and budget grilling has taken on new urgency. Besides, why should Kobe beef and tomahawk steaks get all the love? This is barbecue on a budget. (S3 E06)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Sustainable Seafood: Pollution. Overfishing. Abusive labor practices. There's a lot of negative news coming out about the seafood industry lately, and much of it breaks your heart. Today's show celebrates seafood we can eat because it's fished in a way that's humane and environmentally sound. Activists call it sustainable seafood. I call it three great reasons for firing up your grill. (S3 E07)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Social Distance Tailgating: From its humble origins on the back of a buckboard wagon to today's high-octane outdoor foodie extravaganzas, tailgating continues to enthrall—make that obsess—American sports fans. This episode is our our annual celebration of tailgating with a global twist. The socializing may be distant this year—all the more reason to up your game at the grill. (S3 E08)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Little Italy: When I was growing up, a trip to Baltimore's Little Italy always meant culinary adventure. Today we celebrate Italian grilling and the food of Little Italys around North America, honoring the Italian reverence for simplicity and fresh seasonal ingredients, and the American passion for big flavors and ingenious grilling techniques. (S3 E09)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Cured and Smoked: In humankind's long march to food security, two ancient preserving techniques have stood out over the millennia: curing and smoking. The first involves preserving foods with salt, soy sauce, or sodium nitrite, and the second technique involves blasting foods with flavorful clouds of wood smoke. Today, we're pushing the envelope on traditional curing and smoking. (S3 E10)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The Improbable Grill: In this show we explore three unexpected techniques for grilling. The first stands the vertical rotisserie used in Mexico and the Middle East. The second involves a piece of equipment you don't usually find at a barbecue—a roofer's torch. The third involves a mystery ingredient that virtually no one on the planet has ever grilled. (S3 E11)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Maryland Crab Feast: This show focuses on my favorite food growing up: callinectes sapidus, better known as the Maryland blue crab. Maryland seafood markets and restaurants come alive with soft shell crabs, eaten shell and all, traditionally deep-fried, here seared over live fire. Which brings us to the summum of the Maryland crab experience: a crab feast known as Maryland steamed crabs. (S3 E12)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Raichlen's Rules: Desserts: Take your desserts to a new level of flavor with Grilled Pound Cake with Berry Salsa and Smoked Whipped Cream, Salt Slab-Grilled Pears with Amaretti And Smoked Whipped Cream, Dessert Quesadillas, Smoked Ice Cream with Rum Raisin Sauce. (S3 E13)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Raichlen Grills St. Louis: When it comes to barbecue, St. Louis isn't yet as famous as Kansas City or Memphis, but the Gateway City is experiencing a live fire renaissance. They're famous for plate-burying pork steaks and eponymous spareribs (trimmed, rubbed, and slow-smoked over applewood). And get ready for a Project Fire first: St. Louis toasted ravioli with homemade marinara sauce. (S4 E01)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Rolled, Stuffed and Grilled: Ever since humankind first put food to fire, the world's grill cultures have wrapped and rolled flavorful ingredients. Steven explores two South American grilled classics—a stuffed chicken breast from Uruguay called pamplona, and a colorful stuffed beef roll Argentineans know as matambre. Plus, a Project Fire Mystery Box recipe that may involve a crustacean.” (S4 E02)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The Breakfast Show: Whether you're hosting guests or seeking a reason to get out of bed, this show amps up your breakfast game by firing up the grill. First, a spectacular breakfast pizza. Next, a supremely satisfying grilled vegetable frittata. Finally, the most outrageous cinnamon rolls we've ever tasted from executive chef Russel Cunningham of St. Louis' Union Station. (S4 E03)

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Field to Fire
programme.desc: Andrew heads to the lake house for a Minnesota shore lunch of fried walleye with lemon sauce and greens.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Field to Fire
programme.desc: Andrew cooks wild hog two ways—a sour and spicy pork vindaloo and a whole hog slow roasted over the open fire.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.sub-title: Nairobi: Green City in the Sun
programme.desc: Nairobi is known as a hard city, full of crime and political corruption, yet it's as cosmopolitan and as cultured as it gets. In order to get to the heart of what it means to be Kenyan, David meets an eclectic variety of local artists and entrepreneurs who open his eyes to the joys, the challenges, and the vibrancy of life in the city and in the ghetto. Through music, art and performance, the people of Nairobi showcase their passions and heritage.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: The Rocco family journeys into the Maasai Mara to have a truly unique and life-changing experience: a Safari adventure to top anyone's bucket list. They learn a thing or two about the circle of life, and spend a day with the nomadic Maasai tribe in their village. David gets a first-hand lesson in what it's like to be a traditional Maasai warrior, from their roles in the community, to their rituals, and finally to their feasts.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: In a city that is still evolving in its identity in the post-Apartheid era, Johannesburg's massive street art scene has caused it to become the cutting edge of modern art in Africa. David spends the day exploring the city with local graffiti artists, learning its history, and sampling its local cuisine. From roadside braai to hipster world markets, the food in Jo'burg proves that the city is at the epicenter of Africa's multifaceted cultural explosion.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: Known for being the home of South African heroes Nelson Mandela and Desmond Tutu, the township of Soweto was, in years past, known as a rough outskirt of Johannesburg. Through the locals and their delicious home-cooked BBQ, David discovers that there's more to Soweto than meets the eye. With a powerful art and dance culture that's full of passion and energy, this tight-knit community is growing into a formidable city of its own.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: With only 12-hours' notice to attend a wedding in Tanzania's capital city, it's a good thing David is in Dar es Salaam, a major hub of fashion, textiles and trade on Africa's East coast. Though he doesn't manage to blend in with the locals at the wedding, he does get to sample the local food available at the Coco beach market, and to take a trip out of the bustling city to an easy-going fishing village to soak up its fresh seafood market. After spending time with a local hotel owner who built hi

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: David speaks with several of the diaspora, Ethiopian-born people who have spent the majority of their lives abroad and have recently moved back to the capital city, Addis Ababa. He realizes that the true spirit of the country, with its reputation for poverty and famine, lies in the younger generations whose entrepreneurial drive and appreciation for preserving their unique culture are paving a new future for a modern Ethiopia.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: In the wake of a 7-year Italian occupation of Addis Ababa, a charming amount of Italian culture intertwines with the modern Ethiopia that the city now represents. David meets up with his friend Fabricio, a proud Italian who spent his childhood in Addis Ababa, and together they explore the remnants of a time long past. From espresso cafes to fine Italian eateries, Ethiopia's capital has many unexpected surprises for Italians and Europeans alike.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Gypsy Barbeque!
programme.desc: A jazz musician sets off Sonia and punches are thrown as Ronnie tries to manage the mayhem, and Matt and Sonia wrestle to bring deluded actors back to reality.

programme.title: M.I.A. & D.E.A
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy go missing, Sonia is on a mission to figure out what they've got up their sleeves.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: Knife Week
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect the girls from two knife wielding debtors who will go to any lengths to keep their vehicles.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

programme.title: Burning Up
programme.desc: Lou's new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel when a botched job puts a serious strain on the company.

programme.title: Playing the Role
programme.desc: First, Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers, and a happy married couple, meanwhile Matt and Lou will hook and book. Then, Matt and Froy wrangle with an out-of-work actor who's lost track of the line between his identity and his latest role. Finally, Froy and Lyndah need to figure out how to get a car from an angry owner, and the competing repo company that got to the job first.

programme.title: Mess with Texas
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home. Back in LA, Frankie's wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking point.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Deep Dish Disaster
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause and incites a full on revolt. Ronnie and Carlos set out on their first unsupervised repo, but their desire to impress is quickly derailed when an erratic debtor lets loose with pepper spray.

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: Matt's Back
programme.desc: Froy and Mike, the new guy, repo a car at a paintball range. When the scene gets out of control, Matt swoops in out of nowhere and saves the day. Then, Sonia and Froy repo a high-end luxury sedan from a snooty pair of Brits in the high-rent district. Finally, Matt and Lou head to a dangerous job with Matt's biggest... and smallest fan.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.desc: “Severance” star Adam Scott stops by to chat. Fitness guru Donna Richardson and her mother Laverne Richardson aka Mama LaVerne stop by to whip up their famous Chicken and Waffles dish. Then, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Alicia Silverstone,Cookbook Club with Molly Yeh& Pilar, Drew's News: “Scream” Edition with Danny Pellegrino

Plus, Drew and Alicia are joined by dating expert Damona Hoffman, who educates them on red flags as they both navigate the world of online dating. Then, Drew continues her Cookbook Countdown, in advance of the release of her first cookbook “Rebel Homemaker,” and is joined by Molly Yeh to Pilar Valdes to whip up tasty Italian dishes. Plus, it's a very special Drew's News: “Scream” Edition with Danny Pellegrino.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Amy Schumer, Violet Young, Olivia Rodrigo, Drew's News

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

Plus, in all new Drew's News, Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Tickled
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a bizarre “competitive endurance tickling” video online, wherein young men are paid to be tied up and tickled, reporter David Farrier reaches out to request a story from the company. But the reply he receives is shocking—the sender mocks Farrier's sexual orientation and threatens extreme legal action should he dig any deeper. So, like any good journalist confronted by a bully, he does just the opposite: he travels to the hidden tickling facilities in Los Angeles and uncovers a vast empire, known for harassing and harming the lives of those who protest their involvement in these films. The more he investigates, the stranger it gets, discovering secret identities and criminal activity. With humor and determination, Farrier and co-director Dylan Reeve summon up every resource available to get to the bottom of this tickling wormhole. Directed by David Farrier

programme.desc: In the west of India live wildcats which you wouldn't expect in India: lions. They live and roam freely in a surrounding where natives live as well. The Maldhari are proud to live in a region together with the lions, although they kill their cattle now and then. The north of Gujarat is mostly a desert where seminomads live. The Fakirani Jat breed a very special camel race: Karai-Camels which are able to swim. The camels swim daily around 3 kilometres to mangrove islands to feed.

programme.title: Asia

Nowhere else in Sabah live as many wild and rare animals as along the river: Orang-Utans, Elephants, crocodiles and proboscis monkeys. But the biodiversity is endangered because more and more palm oil plantations replace the rainforest. The natives fight for the preservation of the forest and the unique wildlife.

programme.title: Larger-Than-Life Art

programme.title: The Latest in Ideas

programme.title: The Creative Zone

programme.title: What in the World?

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now I
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E1 — A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now II
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E2 — From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Young & Bold by Bidgala
programme.desc: Emerging artist portfolio curated by Bidgala, a global online art community empowering young creatives.

programme.title: Happy Hour: Oktoberfest
programme.desc: Happy Hour E3: Oktoberfest — Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.

programme.title: Happy Hour IV
programme.desc: Happy Hour E4 — This art collection masterfully captures life's vibrancy, alive with the exuberant energy of happy hour. Each piece dances with color and movement complementing the refreshing and illuminative mid-tempo tunes of strings, keys, synth leads, and bass.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E1 — A jubilant tribute capturing the essence of merriment and relaxation through a symphony of colors, paired with the musical genres of electro, deep house and lounge. Each piece bursts with bold, expressive designs celebrating the beauty of unwinding.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Eyes On The East E2 — A powerful collection of artwork celebrating the diverse and rich cultural heritage of the Asian American and Pacific Islander community.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Women Artists Now E3: Empowered Women by HUG — Dive into a world of creativity and empowerment with a vibrant showcase by talented women artists from diverse backgrounds. Each piece is a testament to the unique power of female voices, collectively weaving a dynamic narrative of inspiration.
